long_literal+
    Return the base directory containing Cython's caches.
    Priority:
    1. CYTHON_CACHE_DIR
    2. (OS X): ~/Library/Caches/Cython
       (posix not OS X): XDG_CACHE_HOME/cython if XDG_CACHE_HOME defined
    3. ~/.cython
    Z
